sql.query: INSERT INTO tbl_tenant_terminology (tenantId,termKey,singularLabel,pluralLabel) SELECT :tenantId,'workflow',:singularLabel,:pluralLabel WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_tenant_terminology WHERE tenantId=:tenantId2 AND termKey='workflow')
UPDATE tbl_tenant_terminology SET singularLabel=:singularLabel,pluralLabel=:pluralLabel,modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenantId=:tenantId AND termKey='workflow'

INSERT INTO tbl_tenant_terminology (tenantId,termKey,singularLabel,pluralLabel) SELECT :tenantId,'stage',:singularLabel,:pluralLabel WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_tenant_terminology WHERE tenantId=:tenantId2 AND termKey='stage')
UPDATE tbl_tenant_terminology SET singularLabel=:singularLabel,pluralLabel=:pluralLabel,modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenantId=:tenantId AND termKey='stage'

INSERT INTO tbl_tenant_terminology (tenantId,termKey,singularLabel,pluralLabel) SELECT :tenantId,'task',:singularLabel,:pluralLabel WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_tenant_terminology WHERE tenantId=:tenantId2 AND termKey='task')
UPDATE tbl_tenant_terminology SET singularLabel=:singularLabel,pluralLabel=:pluralLabel,modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenantId=:tenantId AND termKey='task'
